scenes.title: The Library Help Desk
scenes.background_prompt: A library help desk with a counter, a computer monitor, stacked returned books, a 'QUIET PLEASE' sign, and warm lighting. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A public library with warm lighting. A girl of about ten in a school uniform — white blouse, navy skirt, and a backpack slung over one shoulder — stands at the help desk counter, leaning forward slightly. Her mouth is open mid-sentence and one hand gestures toward a piece of paper she holds — a reading list, perhaps. Behind the counter, a librarian with short gray hair and rectangular glasses in a soft purple cardigan sits at a computer, looking at the girl attentively over the top of her glasses. Stacked returned books sit in a cart beside the desk. A small sign on the counter reads 'QUIET PLEASE' in neat letters. Behind the librarian, rows of bookshelves stretch into the dim back of the library.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl at the help desk counter, standing and leaning forward slightly, mouth open mid-sentence, one hand gesturing toward a piece of paper she holds. Place librarian behind the counter, sitting at a computer, looking at the girl attentively over her glasses.
scenes.scene_description: In a brightly lit library, a tall wooden bookshelf stands on the far left, filled with rows of books in shades of green, blue, yellow, and brown. In the foreground, a long wooden desk stretches across the scene. On the left side of the desk, a stack of four books sits, including a thick blue book with gold accents, a brown book, and a green book, with a blue book leaning against them. Further right on the desk is another stack of three books with yellow, blue, and white covers. The librarian, an elderly woman with grey hair tied in a bun and wearing round glasses, sits behind the desk. She wears a green cardigan over a light blue collared shirt and is looking towards the right with a gentle smile, her hands resting on a white keyboard. In front of her sits a large, white, rounded computer monitor. To the right of the monitor is a small wooden sign that reads "NET". Standing on the right side of the desk is a young girl with curly brown hair styled in two buns with a yellow ribbon. She is wearing a green cardigan over a yellow and blue striped shirt, dark grey pants, and brown lace-up boots. She carries a brown satchel over her shoulder and holds a white piece of paper in her right hand and two books under her left arm. Behind the librarian, an arched doorway reveals another room filled with bookshelves. To the right of the librarian is another green bookshelf. A large window occupies the right side of the background, showing a sunny day with a blue sky and fluffy white clouds. Outside the window are green trees and a garden with small flowers. Below the window, a stone-paved area is visible. The floor inside the library is made of warm-toned wood.

young girl with curly brown hair buns

sunny day visible through a large window

the girl looks eager to talk

the librarian intends to help the student

girl holding books under her left arm

the girl prepares to borrow her books

tall wooden bookshelf filled with books

because she needs to return a book
